prestazioni: Engine swap to a **Mazda MZR 2.3L DISI Turbo (L3-VDT)** from the Mazdaspeed6/MPS, retaining the Demio's **DY5W chassis** with custom **MazdaSpeed6 engine mounts (Part #BP4K-10-210A)** and **GReddy intercooler kit (11901101)** for the compact engine bay. Forced induction via **Garrett GT2860RS turbo (760338-5002S)** with a **custom 3-inch stainless steel downpipe (HKS 30006-AK001)** and **Tial MV-R 44mm wastegate (MVR44)** to handle 22 psi of boost.

Full **Mazda MZR 2.3L DISI (L3-VDT) internals upgrade** with **JE forged pistons (2618 alloy, 8.5:1 CR, Part #308250)**, **Manley H-beam connecting rods (Part #14090-8)**, and **ACL Race Series main/rod bearings (Part #5M105H/5M106H)**. **Cusco Type-RS 700Nm limited-slip differential (Part #120 001 A)** for FWD torque management, paired with a **PPG close-ratio 6-speed transmission (Part #MZ3A-17-250)** from the Mazdaspeed3.

Standalone **Haltech Elite 2500 ECU** with **Mazda MZR 2.3L DISI (L3-VDT) plug-and-play harness (Haltech HT-150705)** for full boost-by-gear control. **ID1000x injectors (Part #415000)** and **Walbro 450 LPH fuel pump (Part #GSS342)** to support 400+ whp. **Mishimoto oil cooler kit (MMOC-DY-05)** and **Setrab 19-row transmission cooler (Part #52019)** to prevent heat soak in the tight engine bay.
estetica: **Rocket Bunny V1 Demio (DY/DW) widebody kit (Part #RB-DY-001)** with **custom carbon fiber overfenders (Seibon CF-DY5W-FENDER)** and **Volk Racing TE37SL 15x8.5 +15 (Part #TE37SL158515)** wrapped in **Yokohama Advan Neova AD08R 195/50/15** tires. **Custom rear diffuser (Varis Japan, Part #VAR-DY5W-DIFF)** for aggressive aero balance.

**Recaro Pole Position (Part #381 00 5 200)** front seats with **Sparco 6-point harnesses (Part #04527NR)** and **Cusco bolt-in roll cage (Part #128 541 A)** for chassis rigidity. **Custom carbon fiber dashboard overlay (Seibon CF-DY5W-DASH)** and **Momo Mod.78 steering wheel (Part #0111201111)** with **NRG quick-release hub (Part #SRK-100B)** for JDM aesthetics.

**Full custom livery by **Kansai Paint (Mazda Soul Red Crystal Metallic, Code 46V)** with **blacked-out Mazda emblem (Badgeskins, Part #BS-MZD-001)** and **JDM-spec Mazdaspeed6 rear badge (Part #BP4K-51-170)**. **OEM+ LED taillights (Dapper Lighting, Part #DL-MZD-DY-TL)** and **custom carbon fiber side mirrors (Seibon CF-DY5W-MIRROR)** to reduce weight.
